description: Rows is an AI-powered spreadsheet that combines data from 50+ sources for fast analysis, enrichment, and reporting.
tagline: The spreadsheet where teams work faster
overview: Rows is a spreadsheet tool that brings business data together with AI assistance, connecting 50+ sources to analyze data, enrich records, and build reports quickly.
what_is: Rows is an all-in-one spreadsheet that brings business data together, analyzes it, and builds easy-to-read reports with AI support. It speeds up spreadsheet work by letting users ask AI for insights, models, and real-world data enrichment instead of wrestling with formulas.

It suits teams that need quick analysis, report building, or scenario planning, combining live data from more than 50 sources with automated refresh. Rows acts as a hub connecting CRM, advertising, and back-office data, working as a collaborative spreadsheet rather than a replacement for advanced statistical software or databases.
